features: THOUSANDS OF HAPPY CUSTOMERS: Remove grease and oil stains with the Elbow Grease All Purpose Degreaser. This spray that has taken social media by storm and is a firm favourite of Mrs. Hinch

POWERFUL ALL PURPOSE CLEANER: This Elbow Grease spray handles all kinds of grease & stains across multiple surfaces. From kitchen counters to car engines, this deep clean product cuts through grime without a second thought, leaving surfaces spotless.
SOLVENT FREE FORMULA: Unlike harsh chemical cleaners, this spray is solvent-free, making it safer for use on delicate fabrics and coloured surfaces. Effective cleaning without compromise.

EXTRA LARGE 1 LITRE BOTTLE: This 1L bottle gives you plenty of cleaning power to tackle your entire home and even your vehicle. It's perfect for those who need a reliable cleaner in their kitchen cleaning supplies that will last.

FRESH LEMON SCENT: Enjoy a fresh, clean fragrance in your home with every use. The zesty lemon scent not only leaves rooms smelling pleasant but also adds a burst of freshness that lasts, making it ideal for spaces like the bathroom and kitchen.

VERSATILE USE FOR EVERY ROOM: Use in the kitchen, bathroom, laundry room, and beyond. For use on metal, plastics, and fabrics - keep all your surfaces looking their best. *Do not use on cooker / appliance markings, e.g. dial markings, logos, etc

HEAVY DUTY OVEN CLEANER: Elbow Grease makes oven cleaning easy. Its powerful degreasing action tackles baked-on grease and grime, transforming your oven into a pristine appliance with minimal scrubbing required.

INDUCTION HOB & STAINLESS STEEL FRIENDLY: Keep your kitchen sparkling with this induction hob and stainless steel cleaner. It removes fingerprints, spills, and tough stains, leaving a brilliant shine on all your appliances.

PERFECT FOR BBQS & OUTDOOR USE: Make outdoor cleaning a breeze with Elbow Grease spray! Great for BBQs, patio furniture, and even outdoor play equipment, it’s ideal for keeping your outdoor space fresh and ready for family time.

GREAT FOR AIR FRYER CLEANING: Air fryers can be tricky to clean, but this spray easily cuts through grease buildup. Spray directly on trays, baskets, and surfaces, then wipe clean – keeping your air fryer as good as new
description: Product Description For a sparkling clean home, Elbow Grease All-Purpose Degreaser Spray is the ultimate go-to solution for deep cleaning. This extra-large 1-litre cleaner is designed for tackling stubborn grease, grime, and stains on fabrics, metals, and plastics. Whether it's cleaning kitchen surfaces, removing stubborn stains from fabrics, or shining up the bathroom, this heavy-duty spray effortlessly handles it all. With its fresh lemon scent, each use leaves rooms smelling zesty and fresh. Ideal as a kitchen cleaner, oven cleaner, and even an induction hob cleaner, it’s a versatile product that belongs in every collection of household essentials. With Elbow Grease All-Purpose Degreaser, there’s no need for harsh chemicals, as this solvent-free formula is safe yet highly effective. Known for its popularity among cleaning influencers and rave reviews from happy users, this is the product that truly lives up to the hype. Say goodbye to grease and hello to a spotless home with Elbow Grease – a cleaning product that works hard, so you don’t have to. Ingredients Less Than 5% Cationic Surfactants, Non-ionic Surfactants, Phosphates, Also Contains: Perfume, Limonene Directions Hard surfaces: Make sure nozzle is turned to the ON position. Spray onto a clean cloth and wipe surfaces. For tougher deposits, spray directly onto surface and wipe off with a clean cloth. Stubborn deposits may require further applications. Fabrics: Spray directly onto stain and then wash as usual. Elbow Grease will not evaporate in washing machines. Manufacturer Contact Information 151 Products Limited, The Old School House, 39 Bengal Street, Manchester, M4 6AF, UK. 151 Products (Ireland), Block 3, Harcourt Centre, Harcourt Road, Dublin 2, D02 A339, Ireland. See more
